positive: An intricately detailed, stylized botanical illustration of floating celestial elements, featuring interwoven crescent moons, zodiac constellation outlines, and ethereal wildflowers. The style should be a high-contrast, deep indigo blue and aged cream linocut engraving mixed with delicate watercolor wash accents. Central composition, framed within a perfect circle or shield shape. Strong, clear silhouettes with minimal gradients, maximizing visual punch for apparel printing. The composition must feel mystical, symmetrical, and highly decorative, resembling vintage celestial almanac art. Dramatic, diffused studio lighting emphasizing clean edges and deep shadows.
